nodes.name: Bean Burrito Bowl — Berry Boost Style
nodes.description: name: Bean Burrito Bowl — Berry Boost Style | short_description: Bean Burrito Bowl with black beans, rice, corn, lettuce, salsa, and cheddar. Protein- and fiber-rich with calcium from cheese; Berry Bo
nodes.text_for_embedding: Meal: Bean Burrito Bowl — Berry Boost Style - name: Bean Burrito Bowl — Berry Boost Style | short_description: Bean Burrito Bowl with black beans, rice, corn, lettuce, salsa, and cheddar. Protein- and fiber-rich with calcium from cheese; Berry Boost-style variation suggested via addition of fresh berries for antioxidant boost. | meal_suggestion: Enjoy as-is, then add a Berry Boost by topping with fresh berries or serving a berry salsa alongside. For extra healthy fats, include sliced avocado and a squeeze of lime for brightness. | nutrition_note: Highlights: good plant-based protein from black beans; fiber from beans, rice, and corn; calcium from cheddar; fat content depends on cheese amount; sodium varies with salsa and cheese. Berry Boost style: add fresh berries (e.g., strawberries, blueberries) on top or mix into salsa to boost antioxidants with minimal extra calories. For a lighter option, consider part-skim cheddar or reducing cheese and adding avocado for healthy fats.

nodes.name: Tuna Pasta Salad — Smoky Wrap
nodes.description: name: Tuna Pasta Salad — Smoky Wrap | short_description: Protein-rich tuna pasta salad with cucumber and cherry tomatoes tossed in olive oil; versatile for wraps or quick bowls. | meal_suggestion: Ser
nodes.text_for_embedding: Meal: Tuna Pasta Salad — Smoky Wrap - name: Tuna Pasta Salad — Smoky Wrap | short_description: Protein-rich tuna pasta salad with cucumber and cherry tomatoes tossed in olive oil; versatile for wraps or quick bowls. | meal_suggestion: Serve as a smoky wrap by spooning the tuna pasta salad into a whole-grain tortilla with a handful of greens, or enjoy as a ready-to-eat pasta salad in a bowl. | nutrition_note: Protein from tuna, complex carbohydrates from pasta, and healthy fats from olive oil provide a balanced base. Cucumber and cherry tomatoes add fiber and micronutrients. Canned tuna can be high in sodium, so consider tuna in water and drain well or control portion size to manage sodium and calories.

nodes.description: name: Turkey Sandwich — Garden Veg Combo | short_description: A lean turkey sandwich on whole-grain bread with lettuce, tomato, and mustard—protein-rich, fiber-forward, veggie-packed. | meal_suggestio
nodes.text_for_embedding: Meal: Turkey Sandwich — Garden Veg Combo - name: Turkey Sandwich — Garden Veg Combo | short_description: A lean turkey sandwich on whole-grain bread with lettuce, tomato, and mustard—protein-rich, fiber-forward, veggie-packed. | meal_suggestion: Great grab-and-go lunch; pair with a fruit (apple/banana) and a glass of water for a balanced meal. | nutrition_note: Lean protein from turkey + fiber from whole-grain bread; adds veggies (lettuce, tomato) for vitamins and fullness; mustard adds flavor with minimal fat; monitor sodium if using processed turkey or condiments.
